feat.name: Wind Seeker
feat.text: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below. You add *aerial form* to your apparition spell repertoire, allowing you to cast it with your apparition spellcasting. Whenever you use *aerial form* to gain a form that grants you a specific Acrobatics modifier, you gain a +1 status bonus to Acrobatics checks.

traits.name: Animist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the animist class.

feat.special: If you are attuned to an apparition of darkened boughs, add the bat and bird forms in aerial form to your *darkened forest form* lists.
